en: Ripping the runway, serving the runway, eating the runway, pumping the runway, pool the wrong way, pulling the runway.
ko: 런웨이를 찢고, 런웨이를 서브하고, 런웨이를 삼키고, 런웨이를 펌핑하고,
ja: ランウェイを制覇、ランウェイを魅了、
zhTW: 撕裂舞台，佔領舞台，吃掉舞台，
vi: Xat xuyen san dien, phuc vu san dien, an san dien,

en: Is she here? She's in the back.
She pulls him, pulls him down.
But if this ever changes, where's Doris?
ja: もし言葉で変わったら...
zhTW: 但如果這用言語改變的話...
vi: Nhung neu dieu nay thay doi bang loi...

en: Taking the night off. She's not welcome here.
ja: 彼女はここでは歓迎されない。
vi: Co ay khong duoc chao don o day.

en: Oh, who's this one from? I got you the biggest one because I love you the most.
ja: 一番大きいのを選んだ。一番愛してるから。
zhTW: 我挑了最大的，因為我最愛你。
vi: Toi chon cai lon nhat vi toi yeu ban nhat.

en: I can't accept this. Think nothing of it.
I've got six more at home. What? She's right.
ko: 아, 아무것도 아니야. 집에 여섯 개 더 있어.
ja: 気にしないで。家にあと6個あるから。
zhTW: 噢，別客氣。我家裡還有六個。
vi: O, dung ban tam. Toi con sau cai o nha.

en: A baby is only going to strengthen the love that Shrek and Fiona have.
ko: 맞아! 아기는 슈렉과 피오나의 사랑을 더 강하게 만들 뿐이야!
ja: 彼女の言う通り!赤ちゃんはシュレックとフィオナの愛を強くする!
zhTW: 她說得對！寶寶只會讓史瑞克和費歐娜的愛更堅強！
vi: Co ay noi dung! Em be chi lam tinh yeu cua Shrek va Fiona them vung chac!

en: Everybody stay calm. We're all going to die.
Quickly, ladies. You're like a hobo.
ja: 浮浪者みたいだ。勘弁してよ!
vi: Ban nhu ke lang thang. O, thoi di!

en: Oh, give me a break. Rapunzel. Rapunzel.
ja: 浮浪者みたいだ。勘弁してよ!
vi: Ban nhu ke lang thang. O, thoi di!

en: Rapunzel, let down the golden extensions.
ja: 金のエクステを降ろして!

en: I know he's a jerk and everything, but I got to admit, that charming makes me hotter than
ko: 그가 나쁜 놈이긴 하지만, 인정할 건 인정해야...
ja: ヤツは嫌な奴だけど、認めなきゃ...
zhTW: 我知道他是個混蛋，但我得承認...
vi: Toi biet anh ta la do kho chiu, nhung toi phai thua nhan...
